tagline: Learn aviation theory that actually sticks.
hero_art_alt: A glider soaring in thermals above the clouds
seo_desc_home: An open app for learning the aviation theory for the SPL glider licence: spaced-repetition flashcards, timed drills, an E6B computer and a ULC exam simulation. Offline, in Polish and English.
seo_desc_study: Learn with spaced-repetition flashcards and train abbreviations, numeric values and decision scenarios for the SPL licence exam.
seo_desc_drills: Timed drills and quizzes: unit conversions, navigation, magnetic headings, the E6B wind triangle, performance, the ICAO phonetic alphabet and METAR codes.
seo_desc_exam: Sailplane (SPL) licence exam simulation from the official ULC question bank: full mode and per-subject practice with instant scoring.
seo_desc_dashboard: Track your SPL theory progress: exam readiness, mastered subjects and attempt history - all stored locally on your device.
feat_met_desc: Decode reports, clouds, icing and fronts - without rote memorising.
feat_aero_desc: Forces, the stall and limit speeds explained through examples.
feat_nav_desc: Rules of thumb, conversions and chart reading - fast and sure.
session_empty: Nothing to study right now. Come back later.
mode_all_desc: Every flashcard from all subjects, due reviews first.
mode_abbreviations_desc: Aviation abbreviations and codes: expand them and state what they mean.
mode_numbers_desc: Values, limits and thresholds - link concepts to numbers.
mode_scenarios_desc: In-flight decision situations: plan your response, then compare with a model checklist.
study_external_desc: Practise questions from external banks in study mode, with instant feedback.
study_external_card_desc: Question practice with instant checking and explanations.
study_external_hint: Pick a category or practise the whole bank.
e6b_card_desc: Interactive navigation calculator: headings and the wind triangle.
e6b_lead: A navigation aid for heading conversions and the wind triangle.
exam_source_error: Could not load the question source.
exam_no_questions: No questions for this subject yet.
dashboard_import_error: Could not read the backup file.
enc_high: Climbing! You're well on your way to passing the theory.
enc_mid: Steady climb. Practise a few more subjects!
enc_low: Low altitude! Review your weak subjects to catch some lift.
glossary_desc: Search aviation abbreviations and METAR codes.
glossary_card_desc: A searchable dictionary of abbreviations and weather codes.
